name: Rhubarb Cake Dessert
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly grease a 9x13 cake pan.
2. Mix the cake mix according to package instructions and add one stick of melted butter. Pour the mixture into the prepared pan.
3. Spread the rhubarb over the cake mix.
4. Sprinkle the sugar over the rhubarb.
5. Slowly pour the whipping cream over the sugar.
6. Bake at 350 degrees for 1 hour or until the rhubarb is tender and the dessert is bubbling.
7. Top with whipped cream, if desired.
